title: cola rostrata
intro: Cola rostrata, also known as the African cola or wild cola, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Sterculiaceae family. It is widely distributed in the tropical regions of central and western Africa, where it has been used for centuries in traditional medicine. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its alkaloids, which are known to have analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cola rostrata include relieving pain and fever, treating respiratory infections, and supporting digestive health, and it can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion for consumption.
